untranslatable_reason: Signal requires market regime classification (BULL vs BEAR, UPBREAK vs DOWNBREAK) that cannot be directly computed from allowed indicators. The logic is context-dependent on higher-level trend/breakout detection not available in the indicator set. Upper/lower wick identification is possible via bar_props (upper_wick, lower_wick), but matching specific regime contexts requires external regime detection beyond allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Partially translated: Used upper_wick and lower_wick (from bar properties) to identify tall shadows. Used adx_14 > 25 as a proxy for breakout confirmation. Exit conditions set to simple reversal logic (close reverses direction). Full translation blocked by inability to programmatically define bull/bear market and upbreak/downbreak contexts without additional regime indicators.
